description: Team India's management is considering resting key players like Shubman Gill and Jasprit Bumrah for the one-off Afghanistan Test (June 6–10) due to a packed schedule following IPL 2026. With no WTC points at stake and little turnaround time, workload management is the priority. Fringe players like Gurnoor Brar, Manav Suthar, Devdutt Padikkal, Harsh Dubey could earn maiden call-ups instead.

title: TMC MP Yusuf Pathan’s kin beat Mumbai man, his family as car splashes water
description: Yusuf Pathan's father-in-law and two others were arrested for allegedly assaulting a man and his family in Byculla. The incident began when a car splashed water on a relative, leading to an argument and subsequent physical assault with bamboo sticks and a baseball bat. The defence claims both parties were involved in the altercation.

title: Watch: Yogi attributes Subhas Chandra Bose's ‘give me blood' to Swami Vivekananda
description: Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath's misattribution of Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose's famous "give me blood, I will give you freedom" slogan to Swami Vivekananda has sparked widespread criticism. Trinamool and Samajwadi Party leaders condemned the remark, highlighting the BJP's alleged ignorance of Bengal's history and the freedom struggle. The slogan was originally delivered by Netaji to INA soldiers in Burma.

description: A groom in Banda, facing a pre-wedding power cut, led his baraat to the district magistrate's office demanding a bill waiver. Officials assured a resolution, prompting the groom to proceed with his wedding, with an inquiry ordered into the disconnection.

description: A security guard assisted doctors with stitching road accident victims' injuries at Bagaha sub-divisional hospital due to a severe shortage of medical staff. description: Delhi's land surface temperatures are steadily rising, with a 2.8-degree Celsius increase observed between 2015 and 2026. Even March now sees all wards exceeding moderate heat stress thresholds, a concerning first.

description: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage.
